title: Ruairí Cullen
text:
I am a part-qualified accountant with the Mercantile Group and a Business Analytics student at DCU. I have a passion for understanding numbers and real-world data in order to improve decision making.






🚀 In Work: Currently working as accounts payable and receivable between three companies: Beatty Solid Fuels, Shamrock Products Ltd and Stafford Fuels. Learning to balance time and prioritisation!









🚀 In College : Currently working with Agvance Ltd & Animal Farmacy on a live ML inventory dashboard as part of my Applied Consultancy Project at DCU.

title: All About Me
text:
“Versatile business professional with a creative mindset, proven adaptability, and a drive to deliver results in fast-paced environments.”
I am an MSc Business Analytics student at DCU and a Trainee Accountant at the Mercantile Group in Dublin. Over the past three years I have been building a career that bridges two worlds — financial accountability and data-driven decision making.
I believe the most valuable professionals in modern business are those who can read the numbers and understand the story behind them. That is what I am working towards.

title: All About Me
text:
💼 Professional Experience






Trainee Accountant — The Mercantile Group · September 2023 – Present
Running management accounts for Beatty Solid Fuels and handling Accounts Payable & Receivable for Stafford Fuels across three solid fuel companies including Shamrock Products Limited. Responsible for creditor dealings, invoicing, payment processing, bank/credit reconciliations, supplier relations, and inventory management — all while completing ACCA exams simultaneously.









Support Tax Accountant — Oracle (EMEA Tax Compliance Team) · July 2021 – May 2022
INTRA placement assisting Oracle’s EMEA Tax Compliance Team with tax roll forwards, monthly tax payments, and administrative work across entities in the EMEA region. First experience in a large multinational professional environment.

title: All About Me
text:
🎯 Goals






Tip



My goal is to complete my ACCA qualification while deepening my expertise in data analytics and machine learning. I want to work at the intersection of finance and technology — helping organisations make smarter decisions by combining rigorous financial thinking with modern analytical tools.



Complete ACCA qualification and become a fully chartered accountant
Deepen Python, SQL, and machine learning skills through real-world projects
Build a career combining financial expertise with business analytics
Work in financial analytics, FP&A, or data-driven consulting

title: Predictive Inventory Optimisation Dashboard
text:
Applied Consultancy Project · DCU
Client: Agvance Ltd & Animal Farmacy
Status: In progress
Working with a 6-person team for a family-owned agri-nutrition wholesaler experiencing recurring stock-outs.

title: Predictive Inventory Optimisation Dashboard
text:
Project Description
This project involves building a machine learning-powered dashboard that uses historical sales data and seasonal patterns to automate stock replenishment decisions.
The solution integrates with the client’s live systems: - Shopify
- Turbo
- MINTsoft
The project applies a convergent mixed-methods research design, combining: - quantitative machine learning modelling
- qualitative on-site observation
- process mapping
- semi-structured interviews with warehouse staff and the CEO

title: Predictive Inventory Optimisation Dashboard
text:

CRISP-DM

PRISMA

Demand Forecasting

Business Process Mapping

Mixed Methods Research
